name: Tirami Su with Coffee
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Whipped cream or non-dairy topping (cool whip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the egg yolks and sugar until smooth.
2. Add mascarpone cheese and mix on low speed for 2 minutes.
3. Fold in the whipped cream or topping.
4. Combine coffee and brandy in a bowl.
5. Dip 15 ladyfingers one by one into the brandy mixture and line them up on a platter to form a rectangle measuring approximately 7x13 inches.
6. Cover with half of the mascarpone/cream mixture.
7. Repeat with another layer, then top with the remaining cream mixture.
8. Sift chocolate powder over the top.
9. With the remaining ladyfingers, cut them in half and arrange around the rectangle, placing the cut side down. The cream acts as a "glue".
